mapper.insert: insert into member_local_auth( username, password_hash, password_updated_at, failed_login_count, member_id ) values(#{username}, #{passwordHash}, sysdate(), 0, #{memberId})
mapper.select: select local_auth.member_id AS memberId, local_auth.password_hash AS passwordHash from member_local_auth local_auth inner join member member_info on member_info.member_id = local_auth.member_id where local_auth.username = #{loginId} and member_info.member_status = 'ACTIVE' and member_info.deleted_at is null limit 1
select count(*) from member where login_id=#{loginId}
select count(*) from member where nickname=#{nickname}
select * from email_verification where email = #{email} and purpose = #{purpose} order by email_verification_id desc limit 1 for update
select count(*) from email_verification where created_at >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 day)
mapper.insert: insert into email_verification( email, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, attempt_count, resend_count, member_id ) values( #{email}, #{purpose}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt}, 0, 0, null )
mapper.update: update email_verification set verified_at = now() where email_verification_id = #{emailVerificationId} and verified_at is null
